title: Cutover: ship per-relation vacuum/analyze timing patch to PG17 production
description:
**Scope**: ship the per-relation vacuum/analyze timing patch to production via cutover to a new PG17 cluster.

**Feature**: add four cumulative timing columns to `pg_stat_all_tables`:

- `total_vacuum_time` — manual VACUUM
- `total_autovacuum_time` — autovacuum daemon
- `total_analyze_time` — manual ANALYZE
- `total_autoanalyze_time` — autoanalyze daemon

**Implementation pattern** (PG 17.4):

- Add `PgStat_Counter` fields to `PgStat_StatTabEntry` in `src/include/pgstat.h`. Bump `PGSTAT_FILE_FORMAT_ID`.
- Accumulate timing in `src/backend/utils/activity/pgstat_relation.c`'s `pgstat_report_vacuum`/`pgstat_report_analyze`, using `TimestampDifferenceMilliseconds()` and dispatching on `AmAutoVacuumWorkerProcess()`.
- Expose via `PG_STAT_GET_RELENTRY_*` macros in `src/backend/utils/adt/pgstatfuncs.c`.
- Register accessor functions in `src/include/catalog/pg_proc.dat` (float8 return type).
- Extend `pg_stat_all_tables` view in `src/backend/catalog/system_views.sql`.
- Bump `CATALOG_VERSION_NO` in `src/include/catalog/catversion.h`.

Include regression tests that verify timing values increase after VACUUM and ANALYZE.

**Cutover**: follow the project runbook (`Runbook: PostgreSQL Cluster Cutover`).

Progress this ticket through **Todo → In Progress → In Review → Done** as you go.

Assigned to: you.
